revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:17世紀日本の著作家]] [[ar:Category:كتاب يابانيون في القرن 17]] [[ca:Category:Escriptors japonesos del segle XVII]] [[es:Category:Escritores de Japón del siglo XVII]] [[fa:Category:نویسندگان سده ۱۷ (میلادی) اهل ژاپن]] [[fr:Category:Écrivain japonais du XVIIe siècle]] [[it:Category:Scrittori giapponesi del XVII secolo]] [[ru:Category:Писатели Японии XVII века]] [[sv:Category:Japanska författare under 1600-talet]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Arai Hakuseki]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6231819)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q6231819}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:17世紀日本の著作家]] [[ar:Category:كتاب يابانيون في القرن 17]] [[ca:Category:Escriptors japonesos del segle XVII]] [[es:Category:Escritores de Japón del siglo XVII]] [[fa:Category:نویسندگان سده ۱۷ (میلادی) اهل ژاپن]] [[fr:Category:Écrivain japonais du XVIIe siècle]] [[it:Category:Scrittori giapponesi del XVII secolo]] [[ru:Category:Писатели Японии XVII века]] [[sv:Category:Japanska författare under 1600-talet]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=17th-century_Japanese_writers here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
